title: Some Stuff - Tools
description: Some Stuff – Tools is a visual overhaul that reimagines every vanilla Minecraft tool in a clean, modern, and stylized Stuff & Actions art direction, made by BoboTweaks
body:
# **Some Stuff – Tools**

[![Discord](https://img.shields.io/badge/Discord-JOIN-3f0f0f?style=for-the-badge&logo=discord&logoColor=white)](https://discord.gg/6NJZSxXFPV) [![Ko-fi](https://img.shields.io/badge/Ko--fi-SUPPORT-3f0f0f?style=for-the-badge&logo=kofi&logoColor=white)](https://ko-fi.com/bobotweaks) [![Fiverr](https://img.shields.io/badge/Fiverr-HIRE%20ME-3f0f0f?style=for-the-badge&logo=fiverr&logoColor=white)](https://www.fiverr.com/s/1qZlPl6)

a visual refresh that completely redesigns all vanilla Minecraft tools in the modern, clean, and expressive **Stuff & Actions** style.
This pack keeps the core gameplay fully vanilla — no stat changes, no new items. **Only textures and models are updated**, giving familiar tools a fresh identity while staying true to their original purpose.

![tools](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/4c5809bb1b0c9198173a6628221bff2933babfe1.png)

# you may also like my other project [**Dust & Ore**](https://modrinth.com/mod/dust-and-ores) and [**Dust & Ore: Raw Ore Expansion**](https://modrinth.com/mod/dust-and-ore-raw-ore-expansion)
